title: Kanbus clock: debug kbs commands in CLI
description: Add --debug flag to demos/kanbus_clock.py that prints kbs commands, cwd, and stdout/stderr for each lookup so we can diagnose missing descriptions.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Added --debug flag to kanbus_clock CLI to print kbs commands and stdout/stderr for each lookup; wiring through run() and kbs call path.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Fixed debug logging to tolerate mocked subprocess without stderr; tests green again (uv run pytest tests/test_kanbus_clock.py -q).
